
:::: {.content-visible unless-format="revealjs"}
Prepare to track the progress and resolution of artifacts by customizing artifact types and their associated statuses available to be logged on models in your inventory.

::::


:::: {.content-hidden unless-format="revealjs"}
Prepare to track the progress and resolution of artifacts by customizing artifact (finding) types and their associated statuses available to be logged on models in your inventory.

::::
